creator: dsh@bamus.cz
text:
Hi!

On Fri, Jul 13, 2012 at 1:50 PM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:

> Please note that PR ports/169825 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/169825

Thank you! I'm approving the patch.
